name: Stripe Payments
description: Payments, customers, subscriptions, invoices via Stripe's official MCP

env_vars.description: Stripe Secret API Key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...)
env_vars.how_to_set: dashboard.stripe.com → Developers → API keys → Secret key

tools.name: create_payment_intent
tools.description: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent to initiate a payment flow for a specified amount and currency

amount.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD, so 2000 = $20.00)

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code (e.g. usd, eur, gbp)

customer.description: Optional Stripe customer ID to associate with the payment

description.description: Description of the payment shown on dashboard and receipts

metadata.description: Key-value metadata to attach to the PaymentIntent

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List Stripe customers with optional filtering by email or creation date and pagination

email.description: Filter customers by exact email address

starting_after.description: Stripe customer ID to paginate after (for next page)

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Retrieve a Stripe customer by ID with payment methods, subscriptions, and billing details

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a Stripe invoice for a customer that can be sent, finalized, and collected automatically

customer.description: The Stripe customer ID to create the invoice for

collection_method.description: How to collect payment: charge_automatically or send_invoice

days_until_due.description: Number of days until invoice is due (required for send_invoice)

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List Stripe subscriptions with optional filters for customer, status, or price ID

customer.description: Filter subscriptions by Stripe customer ID

status.description: Filter by subscription status: active, past_due, canceled, trialing, incomplete, unpaid
